name: cr-agent-api-docs
description: Agent-first reference documentation for the Clash Royale API.

scripts.format: cd ../.. && prettier --config tools/docs-build/.prettierrc.json --ignore-path tools/docs-build/.prettierignore --write "**/*.md" && prettier --config tools/docs-build/.prettierrc.json --parser markdown --write llms.txt
scripts.build: npm run lint && npm run validate:json && npm run validate:links
